member.office_address: 2346 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-4707

form_analysis.form_instructions_text:
If you would like Rep. Jayapal to submit an individual programmatic or language request on your or your organization's behalf, please fill out this form once per request.

To the extent possible, please provide detailed information regarding the location of your request in the subcommittee bill or report, down to the agency/bureau, account or program (if applicable).**

The deadline to complete this form is now March 5, 11:59 pm PT. 

** Community Project Funding (CPF) requests submitted through this form will not be considered. Our CPF form will be available soon.

sections.description: General information about the requesting entity and the nature of the request.

fields.label: Requesting Entity
fields.help_text: Organization or entity making the request.

fields.label: Request Title
fields.rationale: This follows the provided short title for the request.

fields.label: Request Type
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request for NASA's Science Mission Directorate as indicated in the pre-computed context.

sections.description: Detailed information for programmatic funding requests.

fields.label: Subcommittee
options: National Security, Department of State (Prev. State/Foreign Operations)
fields.rationale: NASA funding falls under the jurisdiction of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee.

fields.label: For Programmatic Requests - Please provide the following: Agency/Account/Program
fields.rationale: Standard agency/account/program format as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Brief Description of Program Request
fields.draft_value: This request would fund NASA's Science Mission Directorate at $9 billion to ensure U.S. leadership in space exploration and scientific discovery.
fields.rationale: Uses the provided short description and adds strategic framing from the advocacy points.

fields.label: Program Funding Level
options: Support the President's FY27 Budget Request
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific funding amount of $9,000,000,000 for NASA's Science Mission Directorate, which is an increase over the FY26 enacted level.

fields.label: Requested Program Funding Amount
fields.help_text: The dollar amount requested for the current fiscal year.
fields.rationale: This is the exact funding ask provided in the reference values.

fields.label: FY26 Enacted Funding Level (if applicable)
fields.help_text: The funding level enacted in the previous fiscal year.
fields.rationale: Uses the pre-filled/authoritative FY2026 enacted figure.

fields.label: Relevance to WA-07
fields.help_text: Explanation of how this funding benefits Washington's 7th District.
fields.draft_value: NASA Science has invested over $42 million in WA-07 since FY2023, including $34.1 million in grants to the University of Washington for critical research on Arctic climate change, sea ice extent, and exoplanet life searches.
fields.rationale: Cites specific spending data for WA-07 and the University of Washington, highlighting high-value grants mentioned in the context.

sections.description: Information required for requests involving specific bill text.

fields.label: Subcommittee
options: National Security, Department of State (Prev. State/Foreign Operations)
fields.rationale: This appears to be a duplicate subcommittee field or belongs to a section that is mutually exclusive based on the primary 'Request Type' selection of 'Program Funding'.

fields.label: For Language Requests - Please provide the following: Agency/Account/Program
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic request; language sections do not apply.

fields.label: Exact Bill Language Request
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic request; language sections do not apply.

fields.label: Justification for Language Request - Why is this necessary?
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic request; language sections do not apply.

fields.label: Relevance to WA-07
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic request; language sections do not apply.

sections.description: Information required for requests involving report language.

fields.label: Subcommittee
options: National Security, Department of State (Prev. State/Foreign Operations)
fields.rationale: This appears to be a duplicate subcommittee field or belongs to a section that is mutually exclusive based on the primary 'Request Type' selection of 'Program Funding'.

fields.label: For Language Requests - Please provide the following: Agency/Account/Program
fields.rationale: Duplicate language section does not apply to this programmatic request.

fields.label: Exact Report Language Request
fields.rationale: Drafted a programmatic justification for the $9,000,000,000 funding level, incorporating local economic impact data for the University of Washington ($34.1M grants) and Earth and Space Research ($8.8M contracts) to justify the request in WA-07. Although the reference values noted 'N/A' for report language, this text provides a strategic baseline for a required field.

fields.label: Justification for Language Request - Why is this necessary?
fields.rationale: Duplicate language section does not apply to this programmatic request.

fields.label: Relevance to WA-07
fields.rationale: Duplicate language section does not apply to this programmatic request.

top_contracts.description: Extended culture of kidney mps and organoids to model acute and chronic exposure to drugs and environmental toxins
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Modeling drug and toxin effects on kidney organoids.
Supporting a year-long intensive workshop for rapid innovation.
